description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, and a weekly schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: build-ubuntu, build-osx, and build-windows. Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, generate a project with CMake, build, and test. The build-osx job should also build an installer and upload it as an artifact. The build-windows job should install Qt, build an installer, and prepare a redistributable package.
